quince-candy-in-thermomix-pequerecetas.name: Quince Candy In Thermomix
instructions: We have been washing them well and cutting them into quarters and withdrawing their heart and seeds.
We cut them into pieces and put them into the glass with the lemon. We cross 30 seconds at progressive 5-7 velocity till a fine purée remains.
We add the 750 g of sugar and mix 10 seconds at Speed 3.
We have 30 minutes, 100 been 3 been scheduled, Speed 5.
Then we cook 10 more minutes at temperature Varoma, Speed 5, and remove the cube and place the basket to evaporate and thick.
Vertemos el dulce de membrillo caliente en recipientes y dejamos enfriar antes de tapar.
